description: Marketing retainer SOW, $15,000/month, 12-month term, vendor retains background IP
parsed_text:
STATEMENT OF WORK — MARKETING RETAINER SERVICES
SOW Number: MKT-SOW-2025-003

This Statement of Work ("SOW") is entered into as of August 1, 2025, between:

ClearSky Consumer Brands, LLC ("Client")
18300 Von Karman Avenue, Suite 600
Irvine, CA 92612
Client Contact: Vanessa Huang, Chief Marketing Officer
PO Number: CMO-2025-901

and

Harbor Creative Agency, Inc. ("Vendor")
2450 Colorado Avenue, Suite 100E
Santa Monica, CA 90404
Vendor Contact: Tyler Marsh, Account Director

SOW Title: Integrated Digital Marketing and Brand Management Retainer

1. SERVICES
Vendor shall provide the following ongoing marketing and creative services on a monthly retainer basis:

(a) Content Marketing: Production of four (4) long-form blog articles and eight (8) social media content packages per month across Instagram, LinkedIn, and X (formerly Twitter);
(b) Paid Media Management: Management of Client's Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads campaigns, including strategy, creative, optimization, and monthly reporting;
(c) Email Marketing: Design and deployment of two (2) email campaigns per month to Client's subscriber list, including A/B testing and performance analytics;
(d) Brand Management: Ongoing maintenance of brand guidelines, review of third-party use of Client's brand assets, and quarterly brand health reporting;
(e) SEO Services: Monthly technical SEO audit, keyword research, and on-page optimization recommendations.

2. TERM
Effective Date: August 1, 2025
Initial Term End Date: July 31, 2026 (12-month initial term)
Renewal: This SOW may be renewed by mutual written agreement for successive 12-month terms. Either party may elect not to renew by providing sixty (60) days' written notice prior to the end of the then-current term.

3. DELIVERABLES
Monthly deliverables include:
- Monthly Content Calendar (due by the 1st of each month for the following month)
- Monthly Paid Media Performance Report (due within 5 business days of month end)
- Email Campaign Deployment (per agreed schedule)
- Quarterly Brand Health Report (due within 10 business days of each quarter end)

4. PRICING AND PAYMENT
Pricing Model: Monthly Retainer
Monthly Retainer Fee: $15,000.00 USD per month
Total Estimated Contract Value (12-month initial term): $180,000.00 USD
Currency: USD

Payment Terms: Monthly retainer invoiced on the first (1st) business day of each month, payment due within fifteen (15) days of invoice date (Net 15). Late payments shall accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

5. ACCEPTANCE AND PERFORMANCE
Client shall designate a primary point of contact to review and provide feedback on deliverables. Vendor shall incorporate reasonable Client feedback within five (5) business days. Performance will be reviewed quarterly against agreed KPIs including cost per click, email open rates, and organic traffic growth.

6. CHANGE ORDERS
Additional services beyond this SOW scope may be requested via a written Change Order. Vendor shall provide a cost estimate within five (5) business days. Change Orders are not effective until executed by both parties.

7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All Client-specific creative deliverables (copy, graphics, campaign assets) created under this SOW shall be the exclusive property of Client upon full payment. Vendor retains ownership of all pre-existing tools, methodologies, templates, and background intellectual property ("Background IP"). Vendor grants Client a perpetual, non-exclusive license to Background IP embedded in deliverables solely for Client's internal business use.

8. GOVERNING LAW
This SOW is governed by the laws of the State of California.

ClearSky Consumer Brands, LLC               Harbor Creative Agency, Inc.
By: /s/ Vanessa Huang                        By: /s/ Tyler Marsh
Name: Vanessa Huang                         Name: Tyler Marsh
Title: Chief Marketing Officer              Title: Account Director
Date: August 1, 2025                        Date: August 1, 2025
